'''''Sunbird''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by [[Nharwaak]] forces to protect their base of operations at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] forces destroyed Transport ''Sunbird'' as a retalitory strike for interfering with the [[Habeen]] arrangement to sell new [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology to the Empire. Contrary to its sister ships, ''[[Petor]]'' and [[Shotgun (CR90 corvette)|''Shotgun'']], the ''Sunbird'' was successful in at least attacking Imperial [[Nebulon-B2 frigate|Frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'' before being destroyed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
